issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 </summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/3xlbbpn6omkgwosw8k8kwooooko8csc8bsykcbiwok.jpg?nc=1)
</details>
<details>
  <summary>Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled</summary>

  ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/j59hi2278w8488ckgs80gk88kg4gos8nuw96zk9e9w.jpg?nc=1)
</details>

### System configuration

Information | Value
--- | ---
AdGuard product: | AdGuard DNS
DNS setup: | Device or router settings
DNS server: | AdGuard DNS Default server
System version: | `dns.adguard-dns.com`
Browser: | Chrome

### Comment

comment.body:
비로그인 경우
1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS -> 프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
2. 마이케이티 앱 실행
3. 아이디 로그인
4. 유효한 id 입력, 일치하지않는 비밀번호 입력 - 강제 실패 
5. 에러발생 (네트워크 오류안내 이미지 노출) - log.onmas.kt.com 차단 추정

로그인의 경우
1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS -> 프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
2. 마이케이티 앱 실행
3. 메뉴 > 설정(우측상단 톱니바퀴) > SNS ID 관리 
4. 에러발생 (네트워크 오류안내 이미지 노출) - log.onmas.kt.com 차단 추정

comment.body: `$redirect` won't support iOS devices but AS scriptlets can't work on time on iOS devices anyways (hence they need tinyshield userscripts) so I don't think `$redirect` would matter much.
if i add ,does it support ios devices which has no **$redirect** support?

It can also be resolved with a scriptlet—'set-cookie':

```adblock
endfield.gryphline.com#%#//scriptlet('set-cookie', 'cookieAccepter', '1')
```

Which method is preferred here: the cosmetic rule or using JavaScript?

@ghajini If I'm not wrong, that rule will block `||html-load.com^` in other platforms that don't support scriptlets too.

I think you can put the domain at https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/7948dfb197ec2fb8148c03d89134c7b420cc4786/BaseFilter/sections/specific.txt#L161 (the rule above `$document,replace=`).

comment.body:
>파일업로드시 아래와같은 에러가 발생하네요 Failed to upload "KakaoTalk_20260316_131515733.mp4"

GitHub 댓글에서 파일 첨부 제한이 5MB 이하라서, 이보다 큰 용량이면 오류가 발생할 수 있습니다. 제 경우 프레임을 20fps 이하로 낮추고 1.25배속으로 편집하여 용량을 줄이고 공유하는 편입니다.

이와 같은 방법으로 영상을 줄여 다시 시도하시거나 유튜브에 업로드하여 공유해 주실 수 있나요?

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).

### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

comment.body:
I can't check it as it's required an account. Is it related to filters or tracking protection options like you mentioned? If so, please do the following:
1. Leave only tracking protection options, AdGuard Base filter
2. Reproduce the problem
3. Try to disable the options one by one to find the problematic one
4. When you do that so, leave only the problematic option
5. Reproduce the problem
6. Open recent activity
7. Make a screenshot of the related requests. It should be modified ones
8. Write which option causes it and send the screenshot here.

issue.body:
Bumps [lint-staged](https://github.com/lint-staged/lint-staged) from 16.3.2 to 16.3.3.
Release notes

Sourced from lint-staged's releases.

v16.3.3

Patch Changes

  • #1740 0109e8d Thanks @​iiroj! - Make sure Git's warning about CRLF line-endings doesn't interfere with creating initial backup stash.
Changelog

Sourced from lint-staged's changelog.

16.3.3

Patch Changes

  • #1740 0109e8d Thanks @​iiroj! - Make sure Git's warning about CRLF line-endings doesn't interfere with creating initial backup stash.
Commits
  • 8aea986 chore(changeset): release
  • 0109e8d fix: strip Git CRLF warning from output
  • See full diff in compare view

[![Dependabot compatibility score](https://dependabot-badges.githubapp.com/badges/compatibility_score?dependency-name=lint-staged&package-manager=npm_and_yarn&previous-version=16.3.2&new-version=16.3.3)](https://docs.github.com/en/github/managing-security-vulnerabilities/about-dependabot-security-updates#about-compatibility-scores) Dependabot will resolve any conflicts with this PR as long as you don't alter it yourself. You can also trigger a rebase manually by commenting `@dependabot rebase`. [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-start) [//]: # (dependabot-automerge-end) ---
Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot show ignore conditions` will show all of the ignore conditions of the specified dependency - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

### Screenshots

</details>
<details>

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking)
 [https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Flogin.kt.com%2Fwamui%2FCusMenuMainMobile.do)
### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼ 
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/oms.js?version=26011401
> 
> ▼
> 
> https://login.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401
> 
>  
> 
> [오류 발생 url]
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mlogCollect.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
> <script src="https://log.onmas.kt.com/js/mtargetOffer.js?version=26011401"></script>
> 
>  
> 
> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.
```
Username: @최형진
```

comment.body:
@hj0210 AdGuard DNS를 사용하는 두 가지 방법 모두에서 네트워크 오류 화면을 확인했습니다. 1. 제보자님의 경우: Android 시스템 설정에서 `dns.adguard-dns.com` 를 수동으로 지정하는 방법 2. AdGuard Android 구독 후, 앱 내에서 DNS 서버 설정을 활성화하는 방법 (제가 처음 발견한 방법) 단, '**로그인 시 ID/PW가 일치하지 않는 경우**'와 더불어, 알려주신 '**SNS ID 관리 화면**'에서만 오류가 발생하는 것으로 확인됩니다.
설정 → "SNS ID 관리" 클릭 후 네트워크 오류 재현 영상 https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a25c215a-f46e-4f4f-8b46-8cbfe9dc8603
> https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/226920#issuecomment-4064943164: 네 동일한 정보로 로그인되는지 확인되었고요 우선 올바른 ID/PW로 재확인하여, 마이케이티 앱 내에서 문제가 없이 로그인된 것인지 궁금합니다. 👀 --- I was able to reproduce the **network error screen** using both methods of enabling AdGuard DNS. 1. In the reporter's case: manually setting `dns.adguard-dns.com` in the Android system DNS settings. 2. After subscribing to AdGuard for Android and enabling the DNS server in the app settings (the method I initially tested). However, the error only appears in the following cases: - when the **login ID/password do not match**, and - when opening the **"SNS ID Management"** page that you mentioned.
Reproduction video: Settings → "SNS ID Management" → network error https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a25c215a-f46e-4f4f-8b46-8cbfe9dc8603
> https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/issues/226920#issuecomment-4064943164 > Yes, I confirmed that the login works with the same credentials. First, could you please confirm whether you are able to log in successfully in the My KT app using the correct ID and password?

issue.title: YouTube live stream ends with infinite loading when Base Filter is active
issue.body: ### Prerequisites - [x] This site DOES NOT contain sexually explicit material, otherwise use [NSFW-specific form](./new?template=bug_report_NSFW.yml); - [x] Filters were updated before reproducing an issue; - [x] AdGuard product version is up-to-date; - [x] Browser version is up-to-date; - [x] If the site or app is broken, disabling AdGuard protection resolves an issue. ### What product do you use? AdGuard Browser Extension ### AdGuard version 5.3.0.23 ### What type of problem have you encountered? Website or app doesn't work properly ### Which browser(s) do you use? Chrome ### Which device do you use? Desktop ### Where is the problem encountered? https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=zD7NRlxbB7M ### Ad Blocking AdGuard Base filter ### Privacy _No response_ ### Social Widgets _No response_ ### Annoyances _No response_ ### Security _No response_ ### Other Filter unblocking search ads and self-promotion ### DNS filters _No response_ ### Language-specific _No response_ ### What Stealth Mode options do you have enabled? _No response_ ### Add your comment and screenshots Summary: After a YouTube live stream ends, the player gets stuck in an infinite loading state when AdGuard Base Filter is enabled. Environment: Browser: Chrome (latest) AdGuard extension for Chrome Active filters: AdGuard Base Filter + User Rules Steps to reproduce: Enable AdGuard Base Filter Open a YouTube live stream Wait for the stream to end The player enters infinite loading and never transitions to the post-stream screen Root cause analysis: Through DevTools investigation, the following has been identified: At the moment the stream ends, YouTube's Service Worker (serviceworker-kevlar-appshell.js) begins a cache update, fetching multiple resources including sw.js_data, live_chat_polymer.js, and player scripts. During this cache update, AdGuard Base Filter's scriptlets interfere with the page re-initialization, preventing the player's end-of-stream handling from completing normally. The following specific rules in AdGuard Base Filter appear to be responsible: ||youtube.com/pagead/ — blocks pagead requests that YouTube requires for post-stream transition ||g.doubleclick.net^ — blocks viewthroughconversion requests issued from youtube.com prevent-setTimeout scriptlet — interferes with timing-dependent stream-end processing set-constant scriptlet targeting ytcfg.data_.EXPERIMENT_FLAGS — causes scheduler.js to throw Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'web_emulated_idle_callback_delay') Workaround currently applied (User Rules): @@/pagead/$domain=youtube.com @@||googleads.g.doubleclick.net/pagead/viewthroughconversion$domain=youtube.com youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('prevent-setTimeout', '(),a,b)', '5000') www.youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('prevent-setTimeout', '(),a,b)', '5000') www.youtube.com#@%#//scriptlet('set-constant', 'ytcfg.data_.EXPERIMENT_FLAGS.web_streaming_watch', 'false') The workaround partially mitigates the issue but does not fully resolve it. A proper fix in the Base Filter rules for youtube.com is needed. ### Privacy - [x] I agree to follow this condition

### Comment
> 현상 구현 (android)
> 1. 설정 -> 연결 -> 기타 연결 설정 -> 프라이빗 DNS ->  프라이빗 DNS 공급자 호스트 이름 입력 (dns.adguard-dns.com)
> 2. 안드로이드 마이케이티 앱을 다운로드
> 3. 마이케이티 앱 로그인 실행
> 
> 
> [호출 url]
> 
> https://login.kt.com/wamui/CusMenuMainMobile.do
> 
> ▼

> https://m.kt.com/js/common/global/mKTGlobal.js?2026031240819

> log.onmas.kt.com 은 kt.com에 종속된 하위도메인입니다. 
> `support@adguard.com에` 메일을 보내드렸습니다. log.onmas.kt.com에 대한 도메인은 광고로 오탐되고 있으며 제외부탁드립니다.

comment.body:
This issue has been automatically marked as stale because it has been open for 3 days with no activity.
Unfortunately, our resources are limited and we can not always take the time to respond to requests about websites that are not popular enough. The issue will be closed if no further activity occurs.
Please note, that AdGuard Filters is an open-source project that is used by different content blockers and we welcome contributions. If you have some technical knowledge about how websites work, you are welcome to create a pull request following [these instructions](https://github.com/AdguardTeam/AdguardFilters/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md).
